subject: WARP EER Processing
body:
I am trying to process EER files for the first time in WARP.  I direct the 
input to a folder with my test EER files (20 files total), give it the 
pixel size and exposure dose.  I leave the EER frame group on the default 
10 because I don't fully understand what that does.  I provide the gain in 
MRC format.  Then press start processing, but nothing happens.  The 
processing status remains grey with the number 20 suggesting it can 
recognize that there are 20 files in the directory.
